title: Show HN: Cactus Hybrid: We taught Gemma 4 to know when it's wrong
summary: Cactus Hybrid 是一个开源项目，通过训练 Gemma 4 模型识别自身错误，提升其可靠性。该项目在模型中引入不确定性评估机制，使其在不确定时能够主动标记或拒绝回答，从而减少错误输出。
summary_en: Cactus Hybrid is an open-source project that trains the Gemma 4 model to recognize its own errors, improving its reliability. It incorporates an uncertainty assessment mechanism, enabling the model to actively flag or refuse answers when uncertain, thus reducing erroneous outputs.
